body_preview: Ensure every agent-run crash captured by `state crashes` carries a diagnostic message, so future sessions can diagnose failures without guessing. Currently 10 of 10 crash events show `no` diagnostic key because `exit_with_state(code)` is called without first calling `stash_diagnostic_error()`. Why this matters: State evidence: `yyds state crashes` shows 10 c
title: Wire crash diagnostics into agent-run exit paths in lib.rs
